message:
chore(gitignore): Add .bv.lock to ignore list

The .bv.lock file is used by beads viewer for local state and should
not be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,3 +14,6 @@ Thumbs.db
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
+
+# BV lock file (ephemeral)
+.beads/.bv.lock
